title: ixeris sonchifolia var. serotina
intro: Ixeris sonchifolia var. serotina, also known as creeping daisy or creeping sow thistle, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Ixeris sonchifolia var. serotina is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
